meta.title: Privacy
meta.description: A plain-English summary of what Vaulto collects, how your data is used and protected, and the control you keep over it — including what we don't yet claim.

hero.heading: Your privacy, in plain English.
hero.lead: Plain-English summary of what Vaulto collects, how we use it, and the control you keep. Pairs with our security overview.
hero.updated: Last updated June 2026 · A full legal policy is published before public launch.

sections.title: What we collect
sections.body: The information you choose to put into your vault (assets, liabilities, documents, and related details), the account details needed to sign you in, and basic usage data needed to run and improve the service.

sections.title: How we use it
sections.body: To provide the product: store your inventory and documents, calculate your net worth, generate the AI overviews you request, and create the snapshots you choose to share. We do not sell your data.

sections.title: Sharing & consent
sections.body: Your data is only shared when you explicitly grant it — for example, when you build a referral package for a professional. You choose what's included, and you can stop sharing at any time.

sections.title: How it's protected
sections.body: Your vault is isolated to your account on every request, passwords are scrypt-hashed, and document access uses short-lived signed links. See the security overview for specifics — including what we don't yet claim.

choices.title: Your choices
items: Access and export the information in your vault.
Revoke a professional's access to a shared snapshot.
Delete vaults and their contents anytime. To delete your whole account, email the privacy address below and we'll erase your data.
